name: pi-codebase-memory-mcp
description_en: Pi package that bridges the codebase-memory-mcp server into pi as native tools — a tree-sitter knowledge graph for fast structural code search, call-path tracing, architecture overviews, and impact analysis.
description_zh: 将 codebase-memory-mcp 服务器桥接到 pi 中作为原生工具的 pi 包 — 用于快速结构代码搜索、调用路径追踪、架构概览和影响分析的 tree-sitter 知识图谱
